title: Aesthetic Knowledge Profile
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter for aesthetic profiles in knowledge/aesthetics/<slug>.md. Version-stamped so skills can handle migrations when the shape evolves.

slug.description: Lowercase-hyphenated identifier. Must match the filename without extension.

first_researched.description: ISO 8601 date of the first research run that created this profile.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date of the most recent append (research update or analysis).

source.description: Primary image source(s) used during research.

image_count.description: Total number of reference images collected across all research runs.

evidence_level.description: standard = 10 or more images collected; limited = fewer than 10.

new_aesthetic.description: true if this aesthetic is not in the aesthetic-literacy dictionary. Marks it as a candidate for promotion to the dictionary.

aliases.description: Optional lowercase or display aliases for the aesthetic profile.
